steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: The game was an anonymous act of political protest against an authoritarian regime. Distribution under those conditions had to be secret. The contrast ("now readily available") confirms the original distribution was hidden.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Surreptitiously = secretly, in a way meant to escape notice. Perfect for clandestine anti-regime distribution.

"Succinctly" (briefly), "dispassionately" (without emotion), and "disingenuously" (insincerely) miss the secrecy needed.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
